elements.original_description: A simple cartoon piggy bank with a coin slot on top, placed on a white surface. The piggy bank is light pink with a cheerful expression.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a simple cartoon piggy bank on a pure white background. The piggy bank is light pink with a cheerful expression and has a coin slot on top. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, minimalistic style.

elements.original_description: The same piggy bank with a sad expression, surrounded by a few scattered coins on the white surface.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of the same cartoon piggy bank on a pure white background. The piggy bank now has a sad expression and is surrounded by a few scattered coins. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, minimalistic style.
